opinion.h: DISTRICT LODGE 34 v. CAVETT CO., 355 U.S. 39 (1957)
DISTRICT LODGE 34, LODGE 804, INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF MACHINISTS, ET AL. v. L. P. CAVETT CO. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 453. Decided November 12, 1957.
opinion.p: Certiorari granted and judgment reversed on authority of cases cited.
J. W. Brown and Plato E. Papps for petitioners.

The petition for writ of certiorari is granted and the judgment of the Supreme Court of Ohio is reversed. Amalgamated Meat Cutters v. Fairlawn Meats, Inc., 353 U.S. 20, 948; Weber v. Anheuser-Busch, Inc., 348 U.S. 468; Garner v. Teamsters Union, 346 U.S. 485.
